channel.title: Bihar on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Bihar on Gajab Jobs

item.title: BTSC Laboratory Assistant Online Form 2026
item.description: BTSC has announced Laboratory Assistant Recruitment 2026 for 1090 vacancies. Eligible candidates with Diploma or B.E./B.Tech can apply online between 06/04/2026 and 06/05/2026. Check complete details including eligibility, fee, age limit and apply before the last date.

item.title: Patna High Court Technical Assistant Online Form 2026
item.description: Patna High Court has invited online applications for Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026. A total of 53 posts are available. Candidates having BCA, ITI or Diploma with 1 year experience can apply between 01 April and 30 April 2026.
